title: metrosideros parallelinervis
intro: Metrosideros parallelinervis, commonly known as the New Zealand rata, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Maori medicine and has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe wounds and reduce the risk of infection. The health benefits of Metrosideros parallelinervis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Metrosideros parallelinervis can be made into topical creams or ointments, which can be applied directly to the skin to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
